title: Ukrainian Charged With Sabotaging Pipelines Between Russia and Germany
summary_full: A man identified only as Serhii K. is accused of overseeing an undersea bombing in 2022 that cut off a key source of Russian gas revenues.
summary_public: A man identified only as Serhii K. is accused of overseeing an undersea bombing in 2022 that cut off a key source of Russian gas revenues.
